topic: Cold exposure and dopamine — the lasting boost
caption: Discover how cold showers can boost your dopamine levels by 250% in just 5 minutes a day! 🚿💧 Cold stress increases the release of brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF), which enhances dopamine production. 🧠 Regular cold exposure can lead to long-term dopamine increases, improving mood and motivation. 💪 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you! 🙏 #coldexposure #dopamineboost #mentalhealth #selfcare #wellness
